title: Nursery Rhyme. DLIV. Natural History.
content:
The dove says coo, coo, what shall I do?
        I can scarce maintain two.
        Pooh, pooh, says the wren, I have got ten,
        And keep them all like gentlemen!
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DLIV. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
